calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-19-2022 Vacated

Notice Of Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions As To Truth Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Her Attorney, Todd Osborne
Off Calendar Sep-08-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Deborah Horowitz (415.945.8843) Plaintiff without her counsel (audio only).
Henry Wirta, Esq. (415.565.9600) of Harrington Foxx Dubrow & Canter LLP for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT TRACY CHAN's Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions As To Truth Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Her Attorney, Todd Osborne: is GRANTED. The request for sanctions against Plaintiff Deborah Horowitz and counsel Todd Osborne is granted in the amount of $1,490.00, payable by October 24, 2022.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order via email to williamclynn@gmail.com

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions As To Truth Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Her Attorney, Todd Osborne
Off Calendar Aug-24-2022 Continued To Sep-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TRACY CHAN'S Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions As To Truth Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Her Attorney, Todd Osborne is Transferred to the Discovery Calendar, Department 301, and continued to be heard on September 8, 2022 at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

Motion To Compel Responses Of Plaintiff To Form Interrogatories And Special Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-23-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TRACY CHAN'S Motion To Compel Responses Of Plaintiff To Form Interrogatories And Special Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Transferred to be heard on the discovery calendar on the same date at 9:00 a.m. in room 301.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)

Motion To Compel Responses Of Plaintiff To Form Interrogatories And Special Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances made in this matter.

RULING: The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion To Compel Responses Of Plaintiff To Form Interrogatories And Special Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $1,690. The prevailing pary shall prepare a proposed order.

Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
